title: dubrueilia pumila
intro: Dubrueilia pumila, also known as Dwarf or Blue Gentian, is a perennial herbaceous plant native to mountainous regions in Europe and Asia. The plant has been traditionally used for its medicinal properties, particularly in treating digestive issues and fever, due to its bitter compounds and flavonoids. Dubrueilia pumila is known to have various health benefits, including reducing inflammation, improving digestion, and providing antioxidant properties. The plant can be prepared in various herbal forms, including infusions, tinctures, and dried roots, which can be consumed to harness its medicinal and health benefits.
